title: allardtia roezlii
intro: Allardtia roezlii, also known as the 'Burmese rosewood' or 'Dillenia roezlii', is a species of flowering plant in the family Dilleniaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Allardtia roezlii are said to include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and aiding in wound healing. In some regions, the plant is prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and poultices for various medicinal purposes.
